summary: Advance notice of next regular scheduled maintenance day

updates.details: Scheduled maintenance day Tuesday 14 July 2026: expect disruption to all CEDA & JASMIN services. Please plan your work accordingly.

summary: Issues over weekend, some processes delayed.

updates.details: Service still degraded & under continuing investigation. Expect further interruptions until further notice.
Issue not yet resolved, new tasks can be added to the queue but the queue is now very long and will take some time to process.
ORCHID GPU cluster running at at ~50% capacity, issue under investigation.
ORCHID GPU cluster now running at full capacity.

summary: Intermittent issues for many web based services

updates.details: Many CEDA and JASMIN web-based services (portals, catalogue service, etc) are experiencing issues: currently under investigation.

affectedServices: JASMIN Accounts Portal and other services
summary: JASMIN Accounts portal currently experience issues with knock-on effect for other services.
